name: Python Basics
description: Learn Python syntax, variables, loops, functions, file handling, and problem-solving fundamentals.

name: Data Structures
description: Learn arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, and algorithmic thinking.

name: Object Oriented Programming
description: Understand classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism, abstraction, and encapsulation.

name: SQL Basics
description: Learn relational databases, SQL queries, joins, indexing, and database design.

name: Machine Learning
description: Learn supervised learning, unsupervised learning, regression, classification, and model evaluation.

name: Deep Learning
description: Learn neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, transformers, and modern deep learning frameworks.

name: Prompt Engineering
description: Learn how to design effective prompts for LLMs to improve output quality and reliability.

name: LangChain
description: Build AI applications using LangChain with tools, memory, chains, and agents.

name: Vector Databases
description: Learn embeddings, semantic search, Pinecone, ChromaDB, and vector similarity search.

name: RAG Systems
description: Build Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems using LLMs and vector databases.

name: Generative AI
description: Learn LLMs, diffusion models, fine-tuning, AI agents, and real-world Generative AI applications.
